candidate_definition_hints.text: Easy and extensible benchmarking in Elixir providing you with lots of statistics!

Library for easy and nice (micro) benchmarking in Elixir. Benchee allows you to compare the performance of different pieces of code at a glance. It is also versatile and extensible, relying only on functions. There are also a bunch of [plugins](#plugins) to draw pretty graphs an…
